name: Sara 2020
subject: Senator Collins just voted against a subpoena of key White House documents in the Senate impeachment trial.
body:
This literally just happened.

Friends,
**Susan Collins just voted against a subpoena of key White House documents in the Senate impeachment trial.**
She's proven again and again that when it comes down to it, she will always back Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump. We know who she is.
No more - it's time to replace her with a Senator we can trust:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: 3 years of fighting for YOU
body:
Americans are sick of the Swamp. The numbers prove it. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5c272eeaee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • January 21, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: 3 years of fighting for YOU**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9c2bfa91f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Americans are sick of the Swamp.** The numbers prove it. By a stunning 40-percent margin, _independents_ say impeachment is “more important to politicians than it is to me.” A nearly identical number say that it’s “more important to the media than it is to me.”

**It’s simple** : Americans want results, not more partisan theater. The 2016 election should have been a wakeup call to career politicians and the Beltway establishment. Instead, they ignored the memo. They’d rather undo an election than fix their behavior.

**But no matter** what manufactured drama is unfolding in Washington on a given day, there has been one constant: President Donald J. Trump has never stopped fighting for you.

**“The forgotten men and women** of our country will be forgotten no longer,” he told the American people from the Capitol steps on Inauguration Day 2017, “The time for empty talk is over. Now arrives the hour of action.”

**President Trump** is the one keeping his promises. On his watch, together we have:
* Created over _7 million jobs_ —and counting

* Achieved the lowest unemployment rate in _half a century_

* Lifted _2.4 million_ of our citizens out of poverty

* Lowered medicine prices at rates not seen _since the 1960s_

* Cut violent crime by nearly _5 percent_ since 2016

**That’s just the short list.** And there’s much more to come.

[“Trump, Republicans working to help our country — despite Democratic obstruction at every turn”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=69baa2287c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **TODAY: Desperate Democrats are demanding a do-over**

**Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA)** and Democrat impeachment leaders are panicking about Senate rules today for one reason: House Democrats didn’t make their case.

**“They said in their brief** , ‘We have overwhelming evidence,’” White House Counsel Pat Cipollone said before the Senate today. Now, [“they’re afraid to make their case.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3cd4d0ecc0&e=3ee4985eea)

**House Democrats want** brand-new witnesses and evidence in the Senate trial because they know their investigation failed. It didn’t persuade the American people—support for impeachment _fell _during the House hearings, despite hundreds of hours of free TV coverage—so their best hope is to search for a distraction from their weak Articles.

**Here’s the left’s problem:** They don’t get to stack the deck in their favor with a phony process in the Senate, too. But that doesn’t mean they won’t try. Here are just five of the worst myths and lies from today alone:
* Schiff claims that the Senate’s rules were “nothing like” the process that was used in President Bill Clinton’s trial. **They are entirely based on the Clinton rules.**

* House Democrats are complaining that new witnesses would not be admitted in the Senate trial. **It is the House’s job to collect all evidence before voting on impeachment. It’s not the Senate’s job to fix their mistakes.**

* They compared this trial to that of a court of law. **A court of law would immediately reject this case because House Democrats have not even accused the President of any criminal wrongdoing.**

* Schiff claims that anything but a long, drawn-out trial would “rig” the process. **Suddenly, Democrats don’t believe in “urgency.” In any case, both sides have 24 hours to make their cases—the same as in Clinton’s trial.**

* Schiff falsely said that President Trump “withheld hundreds of millions of dollars” to coerce an ally to interfere in our elections. **Not a single witness has provided evidence to support this assertion—because there is none.**

**White House Counsel****: **[They want to attack one of our most sacred rights.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=64edd316ad&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
| **Marine One flies through the Swiss Alps en route to the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland** | January 21, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d31aea0401&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=797950a489&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=36e539c0b5)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

It’s a cover-up, plain and simple. Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has proposed rules for the impeachment trial that will ensure that it is neither thorough nor its findings transparent. **It’s clear as day: Donald Trump has something to hide, and Mitch McConnell will do what it takes to cover it up.** [_**Add your name if you think impeachment must be done in public — not covered up.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU0c4Zz-2BnsV85cssvsw95UdtRcm7mEEh1flceBKTdrvTcnH0BKFUPUQVNXcU42v2rCJYooH1x3qfKt25HzTAZH-2B3PXuA-2BVfI3mQTUXi7NvQBcJuHj1B69bqDUvX8wotli0-2BibUG1OjvDbohIdbASKp7MgL4zruByPW01vo1RzBu2cpaEmHbeEZfwgEQlWm5N-2FIxvCi-2F-2Bw2-2FqW3qoV0HzHrz_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFeDIgQHkBfA0O-2BbuiahRSPevSliyI6q8MLYbDYR-2BvCPHi43h3uX47DySx9MdXysIu-2FKF-2FsPzCEnT1esj-2BOp6Ao3F10kkLj8Ku9SS9twnNNYH6S-2F-2BHcOuZXyhYO93mZgL6RD-2B3sC2FX5GE2QzK1O8eX6MMYF5KlMJDXKyVHZvvz3omfUerBXxH36axJweMAH2vH46tYJP88m3LK1xaqPffA6fhveHijEVEu1REqk0igegTNSUdlr45ZImmtV3f1WBHEgy6Rk8TAJCSm5psjbki2dS6wN-2BEjYqjUU4hyAVhtU-2FchGtGQbx4jKAps2OCWXSqA5j8CHR2ONwbu-2BuFnAqD8nTPGXPs2adLLtAXhDLth6WQ-3D-3D) Mitch McConnell’s proposals will ensure that the trial is conducted hastily and away from the public eye:
* Without C-SPAN cameras.
* From 1:00 p.m. to 9:00 p.m.
* For just three days, giving each side — House impeachment managers and Trump’s defense team — only 24 hours to present their arguments.

Also, at 4:40 p.m. Eastern Time today, under Mitch McConnell's direction, Senate Republicans denied the American people the right to hear from first-hand witnesses about Trump's crimes and cover-ups by refusing to allow any testimony, even with a subpoena. These rules are a blatant violation of the Senate’s oath to be impartial jurors. They benefit Trump at the expense of our democracy and keep being updated by McConnell and the GOP to serve their own interests. **If you’re sick and tired of these attempts to protect Trump instead of listening to the people, add your name to support public impeachment:**

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: BREAKING: "Handful of key Republicans will determine whether to call witnesses at President Trump's trial"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | **"Handful of key Republicans will determine whether to call witnesses at President Trump's trial"**
_\-- MSN, earlier today_
* * *
[**Our opponent, Senator Cory Gardner, could be the deciding vote over whether or not firsthand witnesses and evidence are allowed in Trump's impeachment trial. Add your name today to demand Gardner do the right thing and stand up to Trump and McConnell.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712f7/691c9bd/6f7cdf57/11a72219/2967365765/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment?source=em200121-bump") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712f7/691c9bd/6f7cdf57/11a72219/2967365765/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment?source=em200121-bump")
---
Folks --
**An impeachment trial without witnesses or evidence presented is not a trial at all, it 's a sham. Plain and simple.**
Yet, Washington Republicans like Senator Cory Gardner are refusing to uphold the rule of law and do the right thing by taking the impeachment trial seriously and committing to hear from firsthand witnesses.
Even worse, President Trump himself recently raised $100,000 for Gardner as a thank you for having "his back on impeachment."
**We need to put the pressure on Gardner and his Republican colleagues to do the right thing here.**
[**Sign our urgent petition today demanding Cory Gardner and his fellow Washington Republicans allow firsthand witnesses and evidence in today 's impeachment trial of Donald Trump.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712f7/691c9bd/6f7cdf57/11a72216/2967365765/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment?source=em200121-bump")
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637712f7/691c9bd/6f7cdf57/11a72216/2967365765/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/impeachment?source=em200121-bump")
---
Since this process began, Gardner has been putting his party over Coloradans by condemning the impeachment investigation in an attempt to keep Trump and McConnell happy.
Enough is enough -- and we need your help to hold them accountable, so we can make sure Gardner actually does his job.
Thanks for taking action today.
-- John

subject: Add your name: Tell Donald Trump to face the facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
The climate crisis can't wait -- we need to take action now. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=f982629362&e=f54746ec54)
---
| | | Yet again we're standing apart from our international allies. While the rest of the world is trying to step up to address our undeniable climate crisis at the World Economic Forum in Switzerland, President Trump called climate scientists "prophets of doom" -- and once again heeded "caution" in any call to take climate action. He compared climate scientists to "yesterday's foolish fortune tellers" -- simply because he doesn't like the science of climate change. But he can't continue to ignore it, and we won't let him. [**Mike has made the climate crisis a top priority. Add your name if you agree we need to join our international allies in taking on the climate crisis before it's too late!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=4474893388&e=f54746ec54)
---
| [<< ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=7796cf6328&e=f54746ec54 "<< ADD YOUR NAME >>")
---
| Trump denied science and abandoned the climate fight when he pulled out of the Paris Agreement three years ago -- but Mike jumped into action. He helped spearhead a coalition of cities, states, and businesses committed to achieving our commitments. On his very first day as president, Mike will put the U.S. back in the Paris Agreement. He'll restore our global leadership on climate change and accelerate the transition to a clean energy economy. **We need real climate leadership back in the White House, and Mike's ready to do that -- but this crisis can't wait. **[**Add your name to tell President Trump to stop denying the science of climate change and commit to taking real action now, before it's too late!**](https://mikebloomberg.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bd4eb7384f3c2a91e96488936&id=2a26384238&e=f54746ec54) Thanks, Team Bloomberg 2020

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Fight Trump's Impeachment NOW
body:
This sham impeachment is part of the radical Democrats' three year witch hunt...

Peter,

President Trump's Senate impeachment trial is officially underway.

This sham impeachment is part of the radical Democrats' three year witch hunt to undo the 2016 election. Period.

We need more conservative fighters in Washington who will STAND UP to these liberals and SUPPORT our President. I'm proud to have President Trump's endorsement in my race for U.S. Senate and I'm proud to stand with him in this fight.

But to win my race, I need your help right now. Will you help me fight this witch hunt against President Trump?

DONATE $25 TO FIGHT THE WITCH HUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-the-witch-hunt?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2021] DONATE $50 TO FIGHT THE WITCH HUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-the-witch-hunt?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2021] DONATE $100 TO FIGHT THE WITCH HUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-the-witch-hunt?amount=100&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2021] DONATE $250 TO FIGHT THE WITCH HUNT [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-the-witch-hunt?amount=250&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2021]

Nancy Pelosi and her socialist "Squad" in the House proved they'll do ANYTHING to take down President Trump. And if Chuck Schumer flips the Senate, we won't be able to stop them.

That's why I'm counting on you to help me win this race and defend the President from this liberal witch hunt. Can you donate right now? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/stop-the-witch-hunt?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=Jan%2021]

Thank you for your support.

Bill Hagerty

Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN)

Team Hagerty

4515 Harding Pike

Suite 110

name: Mary Mancini
subject: thank you thank you thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
You. Guys. Rock.
Seriously. We can’t believe that you’ve already donated $4,235 towards our DIG2020 program – not to mention the generous donor who has agreed to match funds up to $6,000 this month and fully fund all data acquisitions for 2020. To show our gratitude, and put a little skin in the game, I’ve decided to up the ante.
If we reach $6,000 by midnight tonight I will commit to singing a song of your choice at our next karaoke event on January 29 in Nashville, and have a staff member take a video that we will send out to everyone on our email list. I hate singing in public. That’s how important this is.
Will you make a donation before midnight tonight, and help us close the $1,765 gap to fully fund all data needs for this year (and make me make a fool out of myself)?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ZXVWahn2kkW0qqTOPR902Q2]
Thank you,

--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Mike Siegel
subject: We need Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14164905/148203472/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWY3ZjJmMy0yNzNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mzpaaZ1zGByZv4T5oWU27UBpOizmuyO0upAecMHl7RU=&emci=d889a08a-af3c-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=b5f7f2f3-273d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

**Our healthcare system is broken.** We spend more than any other country and for often terrible outcomes — like sky-high maternal mortality**** right here in Texas. People can’t afford doctors and so we get sick more often. Profits go up for corporations, but bankruptcies rise for the people. **We need Medicare for All. ** My race is critical to the movement for universal healthcare. Neither of my opponents support Medicare for All, unfortunately. When Democrats take back the White House and Senate, it will be a rare moment in history when we can dramatically improve our healthcare system. We can’t miss our chance.

**I am the only candidate in this race who supports Medicare for All and that is why I need your help.

clean_body: Peter, Our healthcare system is broken. We spend more than any other country and for often terrible outcomes — like sky-high maternal mortality** right here in Texas. People can’t afford doctors and so we get sick more often. Profits go up for corporations, but bankruptcies rise for the people. We need Medicare for All. My race is critical to the movement for universal healthcare. Neither of my opponents support Medicare for All, unfortunately. When Democrats take back the White House and Senate, it will be a rare moment in history when we can dramatically improve our healthcare system. We can’t miss our chance. I am the only candidate in this race who supports Medicare for All and that is why I need your help. = = = = = = Medicare for All will save lives. Tens of thousands of people are uninsured in Texas 10 alone. We’ve lost three rural hospitals in ten years, while Republicans refuse Medicaid expansion. Medicare for All will keep those hospitals open. And it will cost the average American less than our current system — allowing us to get the care we need, when we need it. The second largest physician group in the US, the American College of Physicians, just came out in support of Medicare for All: “Major changes are needed to a system that costs too much, leaves too many behind, and delivers too little.” We have the momentum to join other developed countries around the world and guarantee healthcare to all. Let’s build a healthcare system that works for everyone. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel G M T Y | | Detect name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: On the 47th anniversary of Roe v. Wade, 50% of all appellate judges are Trump nominees. This law is at risk more than ever before.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
47 years after the Supreme Court decision in Roe v. Wade , it’s now in serious danger of being overturned thanks to the conservative Kavanaugh court.

Since Kavanaugh’s confirmation, more Republican state legislatures have challenged Roe v. Wade than ever before in our country’s history.
To make matters worse, Mitch McConnell and David Perdue have confirmed 187 federal judges during Trump’s presidency, a shocking number of whom were conservative activists, bloggers, and others rated “not qualified” by the American Bar Association. On the appellate courts, 50% of all judges are Trump appointees.

Georgia and many other state legislatures have passed laws restricting the constitutional right to abortion, all in the hopes of getting one of them to the Supreme Court.

The best chance we have to save Roe v. Wade is by retaking the Senate so we can stop judicial extremists from being confirmed and stop anti-choice federal legislation.

Last week David Perdue helped introduce the Abortion Is Not Healthcare Act that imposes a federal tax on abortion. It is the latest outrage that we cannot let stand. Polling in our race is within the margin of error: Make a donation to help replace Perdue so we can defend Roe in the Senate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-b&noskip=true&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f]
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=5&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=5&express_lane=true] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=23&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=23&express_lane=true] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=50&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=50&express_lane=true] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=100&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=100&express_lane=true] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=250&express_lane=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true&amount=250&express_lane=true] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-a&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&noskip=true]

We need to go further to ensure everyone has the right to make their own healthcare decisions because when women are now allowed to make their own most personal decisions, they are not free.

That includes repealing the Hyde Amendment for people on Medicaid, updating federal policies to ensure the LGBT community isn’t discriminated against when seeking reproductive healthcare, and scrutinizing every federal judicial nominee to guarantee this ruling’s protection for generations to come.

None of that will happen if McConnell has a GOP Senate Majority where Perdue can support the far right’s continued efforts to overturn Roe v. Wade .

Thanks for chipping in on such an important day.

Yours truly,

Teresa

PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE

PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stop-abortion-bans?refcode=em012220-footer&refcode2=4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f]

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Contributions or gifts to Teresa Tomlinson for Senate are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/WWVhkapV1EmtIwGkR1tXrw2] . If you would like to unsubscribe, click here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/4971be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/4a71be8a-3c3d-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTcxYmU4YS0zYzNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vYSKQkG1UGyi4x3cH4fJ04RoWRHfoty8DbkCU5eOt9c=&id=100930058&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com].

Thanks for your support!

As your Representative I will restore our economy, bring back timber jobs and ensure Oregon has a reliable voice in Washington D.C. Today I ask for your help. Can you show your support and ? PLUS forward this email to 3 friends? We cannot win without your voice! Let's Go, Alek Skarlatos | | Paid for Alek for Oregon This message was sent from Alek for Oregon and was intended for mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you would like to forward this message to some of your friends, you can to do so. You can also follow the campaign on , , and . If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Alek for Oregon, to unsubscribe.

| Patriot,
Monday night on [Tucker Carlson's show](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D9IQkiIq0GPRyRyhEbSxBgZeo1yxWZA0kDQ83PACLK5GA968WcXwsf_5zyY0KI2rqVCiK-TD5ABOenKfQwCZh8mXm6ZvJlWskFFkeUbF6mw3eET9c1nkWlznvHVPtfQXQMwac9exBSWsqvuPbyy0KWARJArnt9gQ2OZSBc0qX20=&c=Q8_mFtHiLr5j75L628At-Q2VS1X5yc1F5RVVq1z1jRuE2Ag-FfS-bQ==&ch=SqshlOLoYEXVxsemZnRySDaW34261p92tH_yxSqOR0LtsknEioOcfg==), I laid out the impeachment process and what I think the Democrats are up to. Did you catch what I told Tucker?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D9IQkiIq0GPRyRyhEbSxBgZeo1yxWZA0kDQ83PACLK5GA968WcXwsf_5zyY0KI2rqVCiK-TD5ABOenKfQwCZh8mXm6ZvJlWskFFkeUbF6mw3eET9c1nkWlznvHVPtfQXQMwac9exBSWsqvuPbyy0KWARJArnt9gQ2OZSBc0qX20=&c=Q8_mFtHiLr5j75L628At-Q2VS1X5yc1F5RVVq1z1jRuE2Ag-FfS-bQ==&ch=SqshlOLoYEXVxsemZnRySDaW34261p92tH_yxSqOR0LtsknEioOcfg==)

| [Watch the video](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D9IQkiIq0GPRyRyhEbSxBgZeo1yxWZA0kDQ83PACLK5GA968WcXwsf_5zyY0KI2rqVCiK-TD5ABOenKfQwCZh8mXm6ZvJlWskFFkeUbF6mw3eET9c1nkWlznvHVPtfQXQMwac9exBSWsqvuPbyy0KWARJArnt9gQ2OZSBc0qX20=&c=Q8_mFtHiLr5j75L628At-Q2VS1X5yc1F5RVVq1z1jRuE2Ag-FfS-bQ==&ch=SqshlOLoYEXVxsemZnRySDaW34261p92tH_yxSqOR0LtsknEioOcfg==)
The articles of impeachment that Nancy Pelosi, Jerry Nadler, Adam Schiff, and the rest of the House Democrats put together are historically weak. The Senate should take no time at all to dismiss the articles so we can end this national nightmare.
I have been on the front lines defending the President from impeachment since Day One. But we don't have the same level of support in the Senate that we did in the House. There's a chance that some weak RINO senators may break off and vote with the Democrats. WE MUST STAY UNIFIED.
Donate now to the [Impeachment Defense Fund](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001D9IQkiIq0GPRyRyhEbSxBgZeo1yxWZA0kDQ83PACLK5GA968WcXwsf_5zyY0KI2rqVCiK-TD5ABOenKfQwCZh8mXm6ZvJlWskFFkeUbF6mw3eET9c1nkWlznvHVPtfQXQMwac9exBSWsqvuPbyy0KWARJArnt9gQ2OZSBc0qX20=&c=Q8_mFtHiLr5j75L628At-Q2VS1X5yc1F5RVVq1z1jRuE2Ag-FfS-bQ==&ch=SqshlOLoYEXVxsemZnRySDaW34261p92tH_yxSqOR0LtsknEioOcfg==) to defend the President.

| God bless America and our President,

| Matt Gaetz

name: Republican Impeachment Alerts
subject: Trump wins and Dems whine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats' heads are spinning as they try to find a way to rush to impeach and remove President Trump.

Friend,

Democrats have whined and obstructed their way through 2019. While they wasted millions in taxpayer dollars and spent their time trying to smear and impeach our duly elected president, President Trump has been providing WINS for the American people.

* Better trade deals that add hundreds of thousands of American jobs

* Created over 7 million jobs for Americans

* Lifted millions of Americans out of poverty and strengthened our economy

Meanwhile, Democrats' heads are spinning as they try to find a way to rush to impeach and remove President Trump. Democrats cannot hide from their TERRIBLE record of pursuing baseless attacks. [**Help President Trump and his allies Keep America Great for 4 more years - chip in before midnight and your gift will be 2X MATCHED!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014V_ePdgxqapPvSXgj0F9b5AowYK74CNwgNFW2nbHd72lgtaN6xarcOHtjcxjueLiitkwJMF6hf5rYI_pNB59S_8xHR_D_HWkGPQn3aimK7YN_0D0Cg8J3Pg3mOxEbHfieMc4IRPJnnzluP7ytEE6IiRuYiWd4W_CAC2US0ilCGIOH8KhQ3yRZvrQXQtDGlrrrqbIM2MjaXIWh3KPJNWt3ihfFQcCj8OhFA99m1QakGMlvTfYACYGEutZWd0mqAmzpQJ6XTj9EAsNQ-tRYprpuc_toPumUSgso8NEzdMHYxNsT7hgyRrvTHnrmBKdHXoDvCofZnJk9sDloMnAf77E6_pRhMkNaflUhtlQWrkV2EfA6pS8-kEnAsuu5x4W2zp0a8o19CMRfBuSoGnR52BGb6XXc3yihalxKKC3xO23kJyWXulLtnX-b30_1X1DH3F_bhrm4AXf_bAKNQk3SCmXwQ==&c=sBgogOawjVUi8bWvlGdoinNgkToo9AYZOXuXUJvtzpRXg0I8LUgGqw==&ch=PBAkmMSG2NgdNfUHh3MkjpY8_wd7U_eUrHg-xzxdIO_vjrZcKGfPVw==)

**Republicans hold a slim Majority in the Senate.** Even if this impeachment plot fails, Democrats could use the 2020 elections to capture the Senate. There is no telling what could happen without the Republican Senate Majority firewall standing in Democrats' way.

We can't give them an inch. They only need 4 seats to capture the Senate and clear the way for their sinister partisan goals. clean_body: Democrats' heads are spinning as they try to find a way to rush to impeach and remove President Trump. Friend, Democrats have whined and obstructed their way through 2019. While they wasted millions in taxpayer dollars and spent their time trying to smear and impeach our duly elected president, President Trump has been providing WINS for the American people. Better trade deals that add hundreds of thousands of American jobs Created over 7 million jobs for Americans Lifted millions of Americans out of poverty and strengthened our economy Meanwhile, Democrats' heads are spinning as they try to find a way to rush to impeach and remove President Trump. Democrats cannot hide from their TERRIBLE record of pursuing baseless attacks. == House Democrats had the upper hand when Pelosi rushed to impeach President Trump. BUT NOW, the Republican Senate Majority is in control. Republicans hold a slim Majority in the Senate. Even if this impeachment plot fails, Democrats could use the 2020 elections to capture the Senate. There is no telling what could happen without the Republican Senate Majority firewall standing in Democrats' way. We can't give them an inch. They only need 4 seats to capture the Senate and clear the way for their sinister partisan goals. == Democrats will stop at nothing. President Trump is keeping his promises and that makes him a threat to the liberal establishment and the DC Swamp. **We're close to reaching our three millionth contribution to our campaign -- and Elizabeth is looking forward to calling the grassroots donor that pushes us over the finish line. [Chip in today and keep your phone nearby -- it might be you!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a662/45c30650/1e0ee1b7c/66fe8857/242689617/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xSkZfM01DX0RPQ19DXzIwMjAwMTIyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1JF_3MC_DOC_C_20200122_V1S3_P")**
We're closing in on three million contributions to our grassroots movement -- and when we reach it, no one will be more grateful than Elizabeth.

When she launched her campaign for president of the United States, Elizabeth decided she was going to run things differently. That meant -- unlike other candidates in the race -- she wouldn't raise a penny from events where attendees get one-on-one time with her by writing a big check. And she wouldn't spend a minute calling up huge donors to give special access in exchange for some big checks.

Elizabeth wanted to run a 100% grassroots-funded campaign -- where everyone has the same access to events, calls, and her time.

That's why three million contributions is so special: It represents the nearly one million people who have raised their hands and said they were ready to own their equal piece of this movement for big, structural change.

**Elizabeth is looking forward to making a special thank you call to our three millionth contributor -- but she needs our help to push our campaign over the finish line.**

**[Make your first contribution today to help our campaign reach this powerful milestone, and keep your phone nearby -- if you're the three millionth donor, Elizabeth will be reaching out herself to say thank you!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a662/45c30650/1e0ee1b7c/66fe8857/242689617/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xSkZfM01DX0RPQ19DXzIwMjAwMTIyX1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1JF_3MC_DOC_C_20200122_V1S3_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

Get your card TODAY to show that you stand with President Trump and House Conservatives in 2020!

name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Add your name to help protect Roe v. Wade:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76aa/2787512085/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Today marks the 47th anniversary of the _Roe v. Wade_ decision.
The constitutional reproductive freedoms, including abortion rights, guaranteed in _Roe_ increased safety, dignity, autonomy, and economic security for women across our country.
But today those rights are under attack.
The Trump administration is waging an all-out war on women's and reproductive rights. From nominating Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch for the Supreme Court, to forcing Planned Parenthood and other abortion providers out of the Title X program, it is more important than ever that we stand together to protect reproductive freedoms for all.
Senator Markey has always been a reproductive health champion, and he needs us to stand with him in the fight to protect abortion rights.
[**Will you add your name to commit to fighting back against Republican attacks on reproductive freedom? Ed is counting on us to help stop Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell 's far-right, anti-abortion agenda. **](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76a9/2787512085/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjItYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-protect-roe-v-wade?source=em200122-b")
This fight is fundamentally about equality -- saying once and for all that women's rights are not negotiable. They cannot and will not be violated.
We know the forces of sexism and discrimination will not back down from enacting their anti-choice agenda. So it's up to all of us to stand up and fight back -- in the courts, in the streets, and in the Senate.
That's exactly what Senator Markey will continue to do, and today, he's asking us to recommit to the fight to protect _Roe_.
[**Add your name to say that you are with us in this fight to protect _Roe v. Wade_ and the guarantee of reproductive freedom.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76a9/2787512085/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjItYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-protect-roe-v-wade?source=em200122-b")
With Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch on the Supreme Court, these rights have never been more at risk. We must ensure equal access to health care for all.
Together in this fight,
Team Markey
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76a9/2787512085/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjItYiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://markey.bluestatedigital.com/page/signup/markey-protect-roe-v-wade?source=em200122-b")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76a8/2787512085/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfbe/693b8b0a/4340cec2/72de76af/2787512085/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Supreme Court leaves ACA in place -- FOR NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: The Supreme Court has turned down a House Democrats-led motion to consider the GOP's challenge to the Affordable Care Act (ACA), Obama's crowning legislative achievement. Late last year, a federal appeals court ruled that the individual mandate \-- the backbone of the law \-- was unconstitutional and referred the case back to the lower courts to rule whether the law could stand without it. This comes after the Supreme Court already ruled that the individual mandate IS constitutional, throwing the entire law's future into chaos. The GOP has repeatedly tried to trash the ACA before going as far as shutting down the federal government in 2013 and trying to repeal it in 2017 with no replacement, but all of their efforts have failed when Americans made their voices heard and demanded it stay. But this lawsuit could gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions without taking the will of the people into account, so we need to know how engaged Democrats feel about this law before Trump can do more damage to it: **Do you support the Affordable Care Act?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf96/6e9863e8/17e0ed26/1db05a0a/2285364710/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2waHSfY0") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf96/6e9863e8/17e0ed26/1db05a0a/2285364710/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/2waHSfY0") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf96/6e9863e8/17e0ed26/1db05a09/2285364710/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200122a.ND&refcode2=Qyk4dcMqu0sSmYSN509k")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Momentum is Building
body:
Good afternoon Peter,

https://theleadernews.com/jackson-lee-facing-rare-fight-in-upcoming-primary/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a252fe2328-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a252fe2328-32267927
Have you seen this?
Published Wednesday on The Leader's website (https://theleadernews.com/jackson-lee-facing-rare-fight-in-upcoming-primary/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a252fe2328-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a252fe2328-32267927) and delivered to more than 50,000 homes this morning, Marc was featured in an article covering the the race in District 18.

For our campaign, this is big. So far, we have had very little media attention. This article, however, has many quotes from Marc, talking about the importance of this race, and the efforts we have put in to make sure that everyone in the district is heard and represented.

"We've been to every corner of the district...and people want change."

This article just goes to show the impact we've had so far. It quotes Marc saying, "We've been to literally every corner of the district, and the number one thing we're hearing is that people want change...They're ready for a new, younger vision and approach to the most important issues in our country."
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=a252fe2328-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_01_17_06_22_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-a252fe2328-32267927
What the District Needs
District 18 needs a strong leader with reinvigorating energy and progressive ideals, who is also committed to the people and the community. Throughout this campaign, Marc and his team have traveled to every part of the district, finding out how they can make an impact, and then doing so.
What's Next?
We want to inform even more people about Marc, and reach out to more areas in the community to see how we can impact them.

To do this, we need your help. clean_body: Good afternoon Peter, Have you seen this? Published Wednesday on The Leader's website () and delivered to more than 50,000 homes this morning, Marc was featured in an article covering the the race in District 18. For our campaign, this is big. So far, we have had very little media attention. This article, however, has many quotes from Marc, talking about the importance of this race, and the efforts we have put in to make sure that everyone in the district is heard and represented. "We've been to every corner of the district...and people want change." This article just goes to show the impact we've had so far. It quotes Marc saying, "We've been to literally every corner of the district, and the number one thing we're hearing is that people want change...They're ready for a new, younger vision and approach to the most important issues in our country." What the District Needs District 18 needs a strong leader with reinvigorating energy and progressive ideals, who is also committed to the people and the community. Throughout this campaign, Marc and his team have traveled to every part of the district, finding out how they can make an impact, and then doing so. What's Next? We want to inform even more people about Marc, and reach out to more areas in the community to see how we can impact them. To do this, we need your help. name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Senator Collins voted to block witness testimony in the Senate impeachment trial.
body:
We're not surprised.

Friend -
**Last night, Senator Collins voted to block witness testimony in the Senate impeachment trial.**
We're not surprised. She always puts up a big show about being "disappointed" - but we can rarely trust her to do the right thing when it counts.
That's because Senator Collins doesn't care about a fair trial, or about getting all the facts. All she cares about is standing with Mitch McConnell so he'll pour money into her reelection campaign.
Does that make you angry? How about "disappointed?"
[**Fight back with a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's to defeat Susan Collins. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802eb6/4bef7a87/6aa3f3ef/287f8ad9/692805403/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200122-1-full")
**********[FIGHT BACK](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802eb6/4bef7a87/6aa3f3ef/287f8ad9/692805403/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMjItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jan-2020?refcode=em200122-1-full")**********
Susan Collins has shown her true colors again and again. We know who she really is, and it's time to replace her in the Senate.
Keep fighting,
\- Team Sara

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: Impeachment just started in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Join me in supporting a fair process.
|
---
| | Derek --

Yesterday, the Senate began the impeachment trial of the President. In the coming weeks, I'll likely be spending most of each day at my desk in the Senate hearing the serious allegations that the House has laid out against the President.

I am committed to treating this constitutional duty with the seriousness it deserves, which means approaching this trial as an impartial juror.

Every Senator took an oath to protect our Constitution, and I believe that obligates each of us to put country over party and be impartial jurors during this trial. If we're going to have a fair trial, the Senate should be allowed to hear from key witnesses and use all of the facts available to judge the charges against the President.

The American people deserve the truth about whether the President abused the power of his office for his own political gain. This isn't about partisan politics -- it's about due process and the integrity of our constitutional system.

**[Sign here if you will stand with me and call for a fair and honest impeachment process.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d690/53d9897e/534c9557/1c89a180/2671037311/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-impeachmentpetition")**
Thank you for your support,

Mark Warner
---
|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d690/53d9897e/534c9557/1c89a18f/2671037311/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: John Hickenlooper 2020
subject: No doubt about it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
We always knew the attacks from Trump were coming. But President Trump waking up in Switzerland and tweeting misleading smears about John was _not_ something we expected to wake up to this morning, folks. President Trump attacked John Hickenlooper no less than _FOUR_ times on behalf of our opponent, Senator Cory Gardner (R) last night. **There 's no doubt in our minds this was just a political reward for Gardner voting against allowing firsthand witnesses and evidence in Donald Trump's impeachment trial yesterday.** We are gearing up for even more attacks, especially with Trump promising to campaign "a lot" for Gardner this year. But we need your help to make sure our campaign is ready. So, we're asking: **Can you chip in $10 or more to help us fight back against Donald Trump 's latest attack on our campaign? name: Paul Shashy, Campaign Manager
subject: FWD: Victory or defeat?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We recently launched our vital effort DEFEAT the swamp insiders by getting out the conservative vote...
Peter, The team sent me an update this morning. I’m concerned, and so is Coach. We recently launched our vital effort DEFEAT the swamp insiders by getting out the conservative vote... **and we still need to raise $18,653 before next week!** If you’ve already responded, THANK YOU for helping us execute on our game plan. And if you haven’t chipped in yet, **[please rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/5009eb0e715ec11ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)** As the team explained below, Coach is running neck and neck with Jeff Sessions. It’s going to come down to the wire... and while they will very likely outspend us, Coach REFUSES to be outworked! But he can’t do it alone, Peter. We need everyone who wants to see Coach win this race to step up now, before it’s too late. **[Rush an emergency donation right now to help fund our get-out-the-vote campaign!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/bbc9063762e1762ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)** \- Paul | |
---
From: Team Tuberville
To: All Supporters
Date: January 21, 2020
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/6bad138d8b77ff41c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
Paul,

_Have you seen the polls?_

This race is coming down to the wire... and what we do RIGHT NOW will make the difference between victory and defeat.

Coach is locked in a neck and neck race with failed career politician Jeff Sessions, and he needs YOU to execute on our game plan to win!

Impeachment is now in the Senate and ask yourself who you would rather there to defend the President...

Today, we’re launching a new fundraising drive to fund our critical get-out-the-vote campaign. We’ve crunched the numbers... **and we need to raise $23,683 by next week**.

So please, stand with Coach as he takes the fight to the swamp insiders.

**[** Tap or click here to rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/fec7cb11720cb1bec3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

With just 42 days to go until the primary election, there’s no time to waste. Coach has been hitting the weak-kneed establishment Republicans where it hurts, and they’re hitting back.

These people are DESPERATE to keep their grip on power. **The last thing they want is to see a straight-talking, Trump-supporting outsider like Coach win this race!**

They may outspend us, Paul. But they WILL NOT outwork us.

[**Make a contribution today to help build our get-out-the-vote program**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/7ad586c4ed281714c3d6b838967d376c/33013), so we can fire up grassroots conservatives across Alabama and get them to the polls!

\- Team Tuberville

**[YES! I’ll chip in $5>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/3df5351051b0eb95c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
**[YES! I’ll chip in $10>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/8c0e706d3358a72ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
**[YES! I’ll chip in $25>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/6aa095da6d5756fec3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
**[YES! I’ll chip in $50>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2ddab8ec234746b/750980a2226a5386c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Vicky's Story
body:
Dear Peter,

Immigration is a vital part of the American Dream. My friend of 40 years, Vicky, immigrated to the United States when she was younger, and worked hard every day to provide a better life for herself and her family. Like so many people I have met walking the neighborhoods in our district, I had the privilege of hearing Vicky's story of her newly granted citizenship.

People like Vicky are the happiest when they finally become citizens and get out from living in fear. While there are many like Vicky who have had the opportunity to become citizens of this great country, there are still many more who live in daily fear of their government. Time and time again, I have talked with hard working and law abiding mothers, fathers, sons and daughters who fear the very government and system meant to protect them.

It is our responsibility to provide hard working people like this a pathway to citizenship that so many of us have been afforded. Too many young people who know no other country, language and culture and who contribute so much to our community deserve the right to become citizens.

It is our responsibility to work to fix our broken immigration system. No one should live like this in America. If you support having a representative that stands for hard working members of our community like Vicky, please follow the link below and contribute to my campaign.

#FloresForUs #WeCanDoBetter

In partnership,

Marc

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Sen. Marsha Blackburn: Impeachment Trial is a Political Farce
body:
House Democrats’ impeachment managers had one big goal yesterday: trying to quickly rewrite their own three-year narrative on impeachment. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9189d7e96f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Sen. Marsha Blackburn: Impeachment Trial is a Political Farce**

House Democrats’ impeachment managers had one big goal yesterday: trying to quickly rewrite their own three-year narrative on impeachment.

“Chief revisionist Rep. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., who chairs the House Intelligence Committee, began by asserting that the House Democrats have compiled evidence of high crimes and misdemeanors perpetrated by the president,” Sen. Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) writes for Fox News.

“Later, however, Schiff revealed that the over 100 hours of testimony, and thousands of pages of documents, that led to his conclusions simply weren’t enough. He then asked that the Senate fetch additional evidence he neglected to secure.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7b2d6f66af&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “There is a strong case to be made that House Intelligence Committee Chairman Adam Schiff seriously mismanaged the House’s impeachment proceedings into President Trump. But Schiff has one word for his critics: whatever . . . This is as lame as it is deceptive,” Kaylee McGhee writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1625f8a2f5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Efforts to remove Trump didn’t start with Ukraine. And won’t end there . . . Maxine Waters has been chanting ‘impeach 45’ since the spring of 2017. Representative Al Green introduced the first impeachment resolution that summer . . . In November 2017 a group of House Democrats introduced additional articles of impeachment. The same thing happened in December 2017, January 2018, March 2019, May 2019, and July 2019,” Matthew Continetti writes for [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89ad5f64f5&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “If the purely partisan and reckless maneuvering of House Democrats receives more than it deserves — rapid disposition with a strong dose of senatorial scorn — future presidents, at least those who face House majorities from the opposite party, can look forward to the _impeachification_ of all political disputes down the road,” Hugh Hewitt writes in [_The Washington Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86552aebab&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=be52ffd0a2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=855ed707d4&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a25335e8ba)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?refcode=20200122_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?refcode=20200122_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1) Team,

This is major news. Just a year and a half ago, this was rated as one of the safest Republican districts in America. Because of your support, we have been able to completely transform this district. Last time, we came within 4.9% of flipping this district -- closing a 30 point gap and surprising the pundits to put this race on the map for the first time and eventually pushing our 6-term incumbent into dropping out of the race and turning it into one of only 5 "toss-up" races (the most competitive in the country).

And we did this by reaching out to ALL our communities -- including communities that no political party had ever approached because they thought it would take too much work. These communities were being left out, left behind, and forgotten. Our campaign was the first in the nation to be run in 15 different languages, and we are doing even more in 2020.

**[Help us keep up the momentum to ensure that Sri and our whole team have what it takes to flip TX-22 by making a grassroots contribution of any amount.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?refcode=20200122_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

We're changing the status quo, and with your help, we will flip this district. We know we can out-organize our competitors in our neighborhoods and keep broadening our voter base by being more inclusive and fighting for all voters to be heard.

Sri said it best: "It was the effort of grassroots volunteers which pushed Pete Olson into dropping out of the race."

We've got to keep up our momentum, but we can't do that without you by our side. Sri doesn't accept corporate PAC money because he knows he serves voters and our communities, not corporations and special interests.

He knows the power of democracy comes from the strength of our communities. Now is the time to use that strength. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Chip in: $15](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20200122_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=20200122_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20200122_FR_tossup)** **[Chip in: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20200122_FR_tossup)** **[Or, chip in another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?express_lane_other=true&refcode=20200122_FR_tossup)** Team Sri | | **[CHIP IN ⇨](https://act.myngp.com/el/3pozUVi7o1RBCkIOZlCbaCc9m_x2ZeQBBKHEvfc9vGM=/IFK0DMGKf2D2S30fDa8KjO5TPhfi7vcMQbcJGE2B-hI=?refcode=20200122_FR_tossup&amount=25&recurring=1)**

name: Cynthia Cano, Powered By People
subject: The GOP is deploying buses to Fort Bend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
We're in
the home stretch.

Early voting has officially begun in Texas’ 28th House District. Beto and
the team have been working hard to turn out voters for Eliz Markowitz:
together, we’ve knocked on more than 24,000 doors the last two weeks
alone.

The good news is that the GOP sees the writing on the wall, and it’s clear
our grassroots power is making them nervous.

The bad news is that they’re pulling out all the stops as a result. We
just learned that Gov. Greg Abbott’s campaign is deploying a fleet of
buses to Fort Bend to beat us.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42139?refcode=ema20200122-77732&t=1019&akid=77732%2E444211%2E6S2fcL ]We’ve got to double our efforts before the election on January 28th.
Can you make a donation today to ensure our team has the resources needed
as we enter this final week?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42139?refcode=ema20200122-77732&t=1020&akid=77732%2E444211%2E6S2fcL ]Donate $3

I know a lot of you have asked why you should care so much about what
happens in Texas, and it’s a fair question — it might feel less important
to you than a race in Florida. So here are three of my reasons:

1. 38 electoral college votes and 36 seats in Congress are closer to
flipping blue than they’ve been in decades.
2. We only need 9 seats (out of 150) to flip the Texas State House. The
lives of 28.7 million Texans will be heavily impacted depending on if
we win or not.
3. Texas has long been the poster-child of GOP strength. Flipping the
state blue would send massive shockwaves through the rest of the
country. We’d let everyone know that no self-described “Republican
stronghold” is safe.

Our most important (and last) Weekend of Action for Eliz kicks off in two
days, and the election itself is just four days after. We need your help
to fund this final stretch of organizing work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42139?refcode=ema20200122-77732&t=1021&akid=77732%2E444211%2E6S2fcL ]Please chip in to help Beto, Eliz, and the Powered By People team win
this election on January 28th, and turn Texas blue in 2020. It all starts
with this seat in Fort Bend.

Thanks for all your support. This race is coming down to the wire,
and your help this weekend can — and will — push us over the edge.

Cynthia Cano
Powered By People

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42139?refcode=ema20200122-77732&t=1022&akid=77732%2E444211%2E6S2fcL ]Donate $3

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=77732%2E444211%2E6S2fcL

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA

name: Warren for President
subject: President Warren's first week in office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
And after the disastrous policies of the Trump administration, the next president is going to inherit a government in crisis that's infected by corruption. It's not going to be easy. But Elizabeth... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a79c/45c30650/1e0df478d/66febd10/3016611635/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

One year from today, the next president will be in the middle of her first week of work. And after the disastrous policies of the Trump administration, she is going to inherit a government in crisis and infected by corruption.

It's not going to be easy. But Elizabeth has a plan.

**In just one year, we could be listening to President Warren announce everything she's done during her first week to jump start the work of rooting out corruption and rebuilding our government.

Keep reading to learn more about what that would look like in a Warren Administration. [But first, we have to ask: Can you chip in right now to help power this campaign to victory in 2020?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a79c/45c30650/1e0df478d/66febd12/3016611635/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xSEZfRUdSX0NPUl9QXzIwMjAwMTIyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1HF_EGR_COR_P_20200122_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
On day one of her administration, President Warren will take aggressive action to root out the corruption and incompetence of the Trump administration.

That includes removing all non-essential political appointees and making sure future appointees want to fulfill their agency's mission, directing the Justice Department to establish an independent task force to investigate violations of specific anti-corruption and public integrity laws during the Trump administration, putting in place the strictest anti-corruption hiring rules of any administration in American history, and much more.

But even though the Trump presidency has been a dark time, it's going to take more to rebuild our government than just his leaving office. President Warren is going to have a lot on her plate, but she's prepared -- not just to root out corruption, but to roll back the Trump administration's shameful policies and to get our government working for the people. And it all starts on day one.

Here are just a few of the other things she's going to do on her first day:
* Reverse the Trump administration's shameful ban on transgender service members
* Require federal contractors to pay a $15 minimum wage
* Start the process of cancelling student loan debt for 42 million Americans
* Reverse Trump's bigoted Muslim Ban
* End all new fossil fuel leases offshore and on public lands

**Elizabeth knows what she needs to do to root out corruption and rebuild our government, and one year from now could be her first full week as president.

[But that won't happen unless we have the resources we need to win, and right now we're behind where we'd like to be. Can you chip in $2 right now so that one year from now, we'll remember what it feels like to be proud of our president?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852a79c/45c30650/1e0df478d/66febd12/3016611635/VEsFDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWphbjIwZnItMy0zIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU4xSEZfRUdSX0NPUl9QXzIwMjAwMTIyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-jan20fr-3-3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMN1HF_EGR_COR_P_20200122_V1S1_P")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: McConnell's Senate trial rules aren't even trying to be fair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, as the Senate begins the trial in earnest with House Democrats currently presenting their arguments now, Mitch McConnell is sitting back grinning, knowing he's already stacked the deck in Trump's favor. The rules of the trial make it so that testimony from each side is limited to three days AND allows senators to object to admitting the House's evidence into the trial, necessitating a majority vote. He's given wavering Republicans multiple outs so they can vote the party line and dismiss charges without hearing from witnesses or presenting new evidence. We need to hear from you immediately so we can understand in real time where engaged Democrats stand: **Do you support removing Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9a/6e9863e8/17e2152b/1db05a13/983628638/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WCeRStK0") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9a/6e9863e8/17e2152b/1db05a13/983628638/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WCeRStK0") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. The WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9a/6e9863e8/17e2152b/1db05a13/983628638/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/WCeRStK0")
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20003

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=6184%2E377263%2ESEyV6_) Yang Gang --

I’m not going to beat around the bush, Yang Gang. I saw a sneak peek at this new ad, and it is going to change the race in Iowa -- if and only if we can hit our goal.

[We have just 11 hours left to raise $657,560‬ so we can get our newest ad on the air in Iowa. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to ensure we make it? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22788?t=5&akid=6184%2E377263%2ESEyV6_) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22788?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=6184%2E377263%2ESEyV6_)

We set this ambitious $1 million goal in 48 hours so we have the momentum to blanket the airwaves across Iowa. I want to make sure that every single caucus goer knows that we are the campaign that will bring Humanity First values and a 21st century economy that works for all Americans.

And that’s why we need to get our latest ad on the air as soon as possible.

[Please give today so we can hit our $1 million goal and get our ad out to the early states in time before people make up their minds. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22788?t=12&akid=6184%2E377263%2ESEyV6_)

It would be unrealistic to tell you that this race is getting any easier because the competition is dwindling. It’s becoming harder by the day to be heard.

So we have no other option -- we have to hit this goal tonight.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/22788?t=13&akid=6184%2E377263%2ESEyV6_)

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: Today we celebrate nearly half a century since this landmark Supreme Court decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
47 years ago Roe v. Wade changed the healthcare landscape for our nation
Peter,
Nearly five decades ago the Supreme Court made Roe v. Wade the law of the land, declaring access to safe and legal abortion a constitutional right.
**The Roe decision changed the landscape of American healthcare — for the better.** Fighting for healthcare access means the right for women to make their own healthcare decisions. The government does not and should not get to decide what happens to our bodies.
As a single mom to a daughter, this issue is deeply personal for me. I need to know that when my daughter grows up her healthcare decisions will be made with her doctor and no one else.
**[Invest in our campaign to elect an official who is committed to preserving a woman’s right to choose >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14185071/148390937/1785235803?refcode=122_roe&amount=20.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxMzU1ZS03NDNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSOAhhe_ntVBslkcaiMQoktre_v9tA7VuT3STYh1wZI=)**
**But today Roe v. Wade is under attack.** Hundreds of Republican legislators are pushing the Supreme Court to strike down Roe, including our Congressman Dan Crenshaw. Crenshaw is a constant threat to healthcare access in Texas, women’s healthcare being no exception.
**[It’s time to elect a representative who knows that a woman’s healthcare is private and should be between her and her doctor. Chip in to our campaign and help protect Roe v. Wade today >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14185073/148390938/1785235803?refcode=122_wade&amount=20.20&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxMzU1ZS03NDNkLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zSOAhhe_ntVBslkcaiMQoktre_v9tA7VuT3STYh1wZI=)**
Thank you,
Elisa Cardnell

clean_body: 47 years ago Roe v. Wade changed the healthcare landscape for our nation Peter, Nearly five decades ago the Supreme Court made Roe v. Wade the law of the land, declaring access to safe and legal abortion a constitutional right. The Roe decision changed the landscape of American healthcare — for the better. Fighting for healthcare access means the right for women to make their own healthcare decisions. The government does not and should not get to decide what happens to our bodies. As a single mom to a daughter, this issue is deeply personal for me. I need to know that when my daughter grows up her healthcare decisions will be made with her doctor and no one else. = But today Roe v. Wade is under attack. Hundreds of Republican legislators are pushing the Supreme Court to strike down Roe, including our Congressman Dan Crenshaw. Crenshaw is a constant threat to healthcare access in Texas, women’s healthcare being no exception. = Thank you, Elisa Cardnell **=** Do you follow us on and ? Join us there to see more campaign updates! = Days until the Texas Primary Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

body:

Last year, our boss, Senator Bob Casey, endorsed Vice President Joe Biden because he knows that Joe has what it takes to beat Donald Trump this November. This weekend, we are kicking off a trip to New Hampshire to get out the vote -- will you join us and other Pennsylvanians who support Joe?

There are only 20 days left until the New Hampshire primary, and it's important that we get undecided voters fired up about Joe Biden. So bring a few friends, and we'll get some important work done to ensure that Joe Biden wins New Hampshire!

**[Can we count on you to make the trip? Check out the details below and RSVP to let us know if you can make it.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e79a6/51dbcc2a/6a812a1f/3ae3d5a/2173390482/VEsE/?g=6S54OTjfd5lafplKjG-ji6A "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pa-nh?source=casey")** | [](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e79a6/51dbcc2a/6a812a1f/3ae3d5a/2173390482/VEsF/?g=6S54OTjfd5lafplKjG-ji6A "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pa-nh?source=casey")

RSVP now and let us know you'll be there to support Joe Biden.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e79a6/51dbcc2a/6a812a1f/3ae3d5a/2173390482/VEsC/?g=6S54OTjfd5lafplKjG-ji6A "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pa-nh?source=casey")**

Team Casey

name: Wendy Davis
subject: On the anniversary of Roe v. Wade, add your name to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
Women should get to decide what happens to their own bodies - plain and simple.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad4/704929dc/161b0fe2/39938cf2/358270534/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azU2LWphLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk56-ja-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=Davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk56-ja-nd")
Friend,
Although the country is consumed by the presidential impeachment trial, we can't lose sight of today's important anniversary: **Forty-seven years ago, the Supreme Court handed down its landmark decision in Roe v. Wade guaranteeing a woman 's right to choose.**
The significance of Roe is personal for countless women, including me. I know what it's like to make the gut-wrenching decision to end a much-wanted pregnancy after discovering a fatal fetal abnormality. Even though that decision was the most difficult I have ever had to make, I'm grateful that it was mine to decide, not the government's. Right now, extremist Republicans are trying to take that deeply personal choice away from women.
**The GOP is determined to overturn Roe v. Wade. That 's why I need you to join me in the fight to defend a woman's right to choose:** **[Sign the petition now to demand Congress protect reproductive freedom.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=Davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk56-ja-nd")**
The Supreme Court is preparing to decide its first reproductive rights case since Donald Trump's appointees, Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh, took their seats on the bench. And over 200 congressional lawmakers have signed on to a letter urging them to overturn Roe v. Wade - including my opponent, Chip Roy.
**Women should get to decide what happens to their own bodies - plain and simple.** Not Chip Roy. Not Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch. Not any old Republican man in a suit. Just women, and the people who they trust to help guide their decisions.
That concept shouldn't be a revolutionary one. But on today's anniversary of Roe v. Wade - and with reproductive rights under seige in our courts - it's up to _all of us_ to carry on this fight for women's bodily autonomy.
**That 's why I'm asking 2,400 people to speak out with me today - by calling on Congress to take action for reproductive rights.** **[Sign the petition: Demand Congress protect reproductive freedom!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=Davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk56-ja-nd")**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SaveReproductiveFreedoms?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=Davis&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-supporter_survey%3Fcode%3Djtk56-ja-nd")
This fight is so important. Thank you for being a part of it.
Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad4/704929dc/161b0fe2/39938cf4/358270534/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad4/704929dc/161b0fe2/39938cf7/358270534/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361ad4/704929dc/161b0fe2/39938cf6/358270534/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: We're taking a stand against dark money. Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The 2010 _Citizens United_ Supreme Court decision opened the floodgates to nearly unlimited political spending in elections. Donations now flood in from corporations, billionaires, and lobbyists, silencing the voices of everyday people in favor of appeasing the rich. We saw this with the 2017 Trump tax cuts, and we'll certainly see it again if he wins re-election. Democrats have proposed a constitutional amendment would allow Congress to eliminate the loopholes that allow companies to pour millions of dollars into campaigns and sway elections. But Mitch McConnell is standing in its way. He's intent on preserving the tight grip dark money and corporate donors have on politics, but we're going to stop him. With this new Democratic push, we're asking engaged Democrats to join us: [**Demand Congress overturn _Citizens United_!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf99/6e9863e8/81c06a1/1db05a4c/4253299941/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf99/6e9863e8/81c06a1/1db05a4c/4253299941/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://sign.actiontaker.org/ECU-10-WDTO")
