name: John Hickenlooper
subject: On this day in 1973
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, In 1967, Colorado became the first state to legalize abortion -- six years before _Roe v. Wade_. When I was Governor, we made it a priority to expand access to reproductive health care. We bought tens of thousands of IUDs to distribute at public health clinics across the state. We expanded access to long-acting reversible contraception (LARC). We reduced teen pregnancies, and at every turn, we held up a woman's fundamental right to choose and led the nation on reproductive freedom. **But Washington Republicans have threatened our progress.** Washington Republicans like my opponent are hellbent on taking us back to the dark ages. They're silencing women, stripping them of control over their own bodies, and trying to ban abortion in every state of this country. On this day in 1973, the Supreme Court legalized abortion across the nation in _Roe v. Wade._ While this remains the law of the land, make no mistake: people like my opponent will do everything they can to overturn it. **Today and every day, I 'm committed to fighting against those who want to strip women of their choices, dignity, and power. And I'm committed to making sure low-income communities, the LGBTQ+ community, and people of color have access to the care they need.** **If you 're with me, I need you to donate $10 to my campaign for U.S. Senate to defeat Cory Gardner and help flip Colorado blue. You can donate right here:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200122-roe?refcode=em-200122-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

I'm about to ask if you can make a donation to our campaign -- because we have a powerfully important goal to reach, and time is running out to hit it.

We have our most important FEC deadline yet coming up on January 31. This is the last deadline before the Iowa caucuses on February 3.

We have a plan to organize in all 50 states -- and build a grassroots movement in communities all over the country. We're taking our message to voters far and wide and giving people a reason to show up and vote. And we can't do it without you.

We started this month learning we were outraised last quarter, but we're not done fighting yet -- and we've made some great progress this month.

**[Elizabeth's counting on grassroots supporters like you to get our campaign to our January fundraising goal-- and we don't have a lot of time left to get this done. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: ORTT CALLS FOR MCMURRAY TO GIVE UP WORKING FAMILIES ENDORSEMENT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| **ORTT CALLS FOR MCMURRAY TO GIVE UP WORKING FAMILIES ENDORSEMENT**
_A press release from Bronze Star recipient and New York State Senator Rob Ortt_ Niagara County, NY --- Today, New York State Senator Rob Ortt, U.S. Army combat veteran, and candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District is calling for Democrat and Working Families endorsed candidate, Nate McMurray, to give up his recent Working Families Party endorsement. Recently, the New York State Working Families Party called on candidates to “stop defending taxpayers,” and stated that using the term “taxpayer” is racist.

“Our district is home to around 710,000 ‘taxpayers’ who go to work every day to help support their families and build a better life,” said Ortt. “The fact that a candidate for New York’s 27th Congressional District would accept an endorsement from a political party that explicitly asked prospective candidates to avoid advocating for the taxpayers of our state is embarrassing. As elected officials, we are chosen by the taxpayers of our district to defend their best interests and do the will of the people. Any politician who accepts and endorsement from the Working Families Party clearly shows they have no interest in protecting hardworking taxpayers.”

The Working Families Party, backed by progressive donors, recently stated in the party’s 2020 questionnaire:

**_Messages that frame ‘taxpayers’ as an aggrieved or marginalized group promotes an anti-tax, anti-government worldview that is often used to justify disinvestment and austerity policies. Taxpayer’ has also become a racially coded term designed to appeal to white individuals and reinforce the misconception that they are paying taxes to support the needs of people (often implied to be non-white) who don’t pay taxes. Will you avoid messaging that centers ‘taxpayers’ or ‘tax burdens’ and instead talk about ‘public funding’ and the public as a whole?_**

Just this week, Nate McMurray accepted the endorsement of the Working Families Party line. The New York State Working Families Party has already endorsed several other candidates for 2020, including for U.S. President (Elizabeth Warren), U.S. Congress (Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez), and Democratic candidates for the New York State Legislature. Ortt called on all candidates running for office to denounce the Working Families Party and refuse their support. McMurray did neither.

“By accepting this endorsement, it is clear that Nate has not prioritized representing the best interests of the constituents in New York’s 27th Congressional District,” said Ortt. “Either he is ignorant of the agenda that the New York State Working Families Party stands for, or he has full knowledge of the statements made by this group and has decided that advocating for ‘taxpayers’ is racist. Either one is unacceptable and I call on him to give up his endorsement by this radically socialist party,” said Ortt. ### _After the terror attacks on September 11, 2001, Ortt enlisted in the U.S. Army and would serve as a First Lieutenant in Afghanistan during Operation Enduring Freedom. During his service, Ortt would be awarded the Bronze Star, the Army Commendation Medal, the Afghanistan Campaign Medal, and the Combat Infantryman’s Badge. Ortt was also deployed to the U.S. Southern border as part of the recently declassified 2006 Operation Jumpstart, which supported border security and construction of a border fence._

name: Team Stephanie
subject: Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
Today marks the 47th anniversary of the Supreme Court's ruling in Roe v. Wade -- the historic decision that guaranteed a woman's right to choose.
|
---

| | Friends -- today marks the 47th anniversary of the Supreme Court's ruling in _Roe v. Wade_ \-- the historic decision that guaranteed a woman's right to choose. Since then, the lives of countless women have been saved, and the world is a safer and healthier place. But Chris Smith is on a one man mission to end safe access to abortion, no exceptions, and our rights are again being challenged by Smith and his colleagues in the Supreme Court. The only defense against these actions is simple: We have to vote out anti-choice members of Congress -- and that starts by beating Chris Smith here in NJ-04 and electing Stephanie in November. Stephanie worked for the Center for Reproductive Rights, fighting for access to healthcare for women around the world, so we know she'll champion our rights in Congress! name: Team Kennedy
subject: Four things you need to know about Joe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390292/55b66746/2dbc4c05/80f907c/2502397687/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are leading a nationwide attack on reproductive rights. They're packing the federal courts with radical right-wing judges determined to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. **Today, on this 47th anniversary of _Roe v. Wade,_ here's what you need to know about Joe:**
1. He has a 100% voting record on reproductive rights, as rated by Planned Parenthood and NARAL.

2. He has championed legislation in Congress to repeal the Hyde Amendment and ensure that low-income people have access to abortion care, including through any future Medicare for All legislation.

3. He has been a strong and early federal advocate for the ROE Act, a state law that would break down barriers to abortion access in Massachusetts.

4. He has been a powerful voice for maternal health care for every pregnant person, including those most at risk and most in need; including improving access to postpartum care through Medicaid.

**Joe believes every woman --and pregnant person--deserves full bodily autonomy. It's time to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Just as he has in the House, Joe will take the fight for reproductive justice directly to the conservative right in the U.S. Senate. ** No more attacks on _Roe v. Wade_. No more attacks on reproductive freedom. - Team Kennedy | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390292/55b66746/2dbc4c05/80f907d/2502397687/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-01-21-roe&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390292/55b66746/2dbc4c05/80f907e/2502397687/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-01-21-roe&refcode2=express-buttons")

He has a 100% voting record on reproductive rights, as rated by Planned Parenthood and NARAL. 2. He has championed legislation in Congress to repeal the Hyde Amendment and ensure that low-income people have access to abortion care, including through any future Medicare for All legislation. 3. He has been a strong and early federal advocate for the ROE Act, a state law that would break down barriers to abortion access in Massachusetts. 4. He has been a powerful voice for maternal health care for every pregnant person, including those most at risk and most in need; including improving access to postpartum care through Medicaid. Joe believes every woman --and pregnant person--deserves full bodily autonomy. It's time to codify Roe v. Wade into law. Just as he has in the House, Joe will take the fight for reproductive justice directly to the conservative right in the U.S. Senate. No more attacks on Roe v. Wade. No more attacks on reproductive freedom. - Team Kennedy | "" | "" ---|--- "" | "" If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137. Email is an important way for Joe Kennedy to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? "". This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com; "". If you no longer want to hear from Joe Kennedy, "" Questions or concerns? "". |

subject: ENDORSEMENT ALERT:

body:
We are excited to share that Congressman Seth Moulton's group -- Serve America -- endorsed the Admiral's candidacy for the U.S. Senate.
|
---
| |
---

| | Friends -- We are excited to share that Congressman Seth Moulton's group -- _Serve America_ \-- endorsed the Admiral's candidacy for the U.S. Senate. **[Please join them with a $5 donation and your endorsement, as well>> ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24da/33365068/4a6fb585/3f8b9f13/466666847/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200122_serveamerica_em_fr_L1&amount=5")** [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24da/33365068/4a6fb585/3f8b9f2c/466666847/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200122_serveamerica_em_fr_img&amount=5") _Serve America's_ goal is to ensure our government works for Americans by supporting life-long civil servants -- from enlisted Marines and hot-shot fighter pilots to CIA field officers and other government workers. I know the Admiral is pleased as punch that Congressman Moulton and the Serve America board have chosen to support his effort to lead for a better future. He will not let them down! Backing like this helps grow our grassroots network by connecting service-oriented Americans to our movement. But, your help is needed as well, . [_**If you can, chip in right now and join this ever-growing group of patriots and leaders >> **_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24da/33365068/4a6fb585/3f8b9f2d/466666847/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200122_serveamerica_em_fr_L2&amount=15") Thank you, Kimberley Boggus

| |

"'I'm not a political insider, that's for sure.' ...Canning supports policies like the Green New Deal, universal healthcare and wants action on climate change." **_Watch and share [KEZI's coverage](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2ym/8SiFsV57Szu5myI6YBgxEA/h1/Y-2FgbIxpjl7vCXwYlxcWe74cJIRNk1BsdXc03JixbMX3KgWMCbbSCydC3bZxBc1tJx4r5FFv8Wllz735lRuDeCmEW-2BarLSIGFVZkel8D4Q-2FyrhhuH3QplPIWyCP2J6-2BtzEUgHs5irbUJ3LWRLlDm-2FMb3T7PnSpW9FWA8U14ROXDb-2B8FfTgYX9Gl75gol0S59r7-2FjHmstk3VbXQ9Q5UfY-2BgTHI-2B0CbW9ryxIeh5riV1-2FSFoukbmRdqiErin018tZ3sfAY-2Bmi3E3Vw41-2Fq7AaHUE2T3tWgZmtvUk6cQOC0m6eLYBQF4IgtF0vhSDLm5vdJEUJdSy96FZcna2V8Tee6oLgSXy1nVB0bR5y2A5Kts4aeAslWGNc78-2F4IoPhlqblfZ/hLCu) of our grassroots campaign. __ _**
---
|
---
Dear supporters, This week has seen a surge in support for our campaign. With back to back local news coverage, another national endorsement, and our weekend of action with signature-gathering street teams of volunteers in Eugene, Roseburg, and Corvallis. **Over 600 voters in our district signed on this weekend on to Doyle Canning for Congress on the ballot for the May primary election.** Let that put to rest any rumors that our campaign doesn't have the support to mount this challenge to a 33-year incumbent. As a wise person once said, "People who say it is impossible should not interrupt the people doing it." The conversations we had with real voters on the street were the same ones we've been having at the doors and on the phones: people are hungry for change, excited about the campaign, and ready to vote Canning for Congress. Thank you for all you're doing to make her-story in 2020. I hope to see you Saturday night at my 40th birthday party fundraiser at the new Cornbread cafe in Springfield! Onward, Doyle
---
|
---
---
Please Join Lauren Regan, Jamil Jonna, Melissa Carino this Saturday for a January Birthday Celebration Fundraiser!
* At Cornbread Cafe's new Springfield location
* Featuring Live Music by Eugene's own Tastebuds
* Open Bar and full menu available.
* Discounts on Food and Drink at the Register for button-wearing supporters.
* Free vegan birthday cake, while it lasts!
* This is a fundraiser. There is no cover charge, but we will be asking every guest to donate as generously as you can to our campaign.

---

**ENDORSEMENT ALERT**
---
|
---
Brand New Congress, the movement that recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to run in 2018, has endorsed Canning for Congress: "Doyle is running in 2020 to continue the fight for healthcare care for all, workers' rights, education reform, criminal justice reform, clean air and clean water and to take on corruption in Washington. Remember, every vote in Congress affects us all."
---
|
---
**IN THE NEWS...**
---
---
[**EUGENE WEEKLY**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2ym/8SiFsV57Szu5myI6YBgxEA/h3/b2QTIghpuhxPHS-2FxFUcaCJiF0ZJUiIR1h3LSY4IoJXwm9kJYi9SwWSl-2B4KC121VNxa9J2zAaZLYNlEAmZr5jkfBuTYXjIvYrZgYuL1-2Bf1RV16IKX1H1oWRec7aarBTHIKfHc3FxTCEHUIltIq5PwXWNLm-2BlEpmMoCB9qpCN2xdzS7TI-2BIn0bR-2Bm8DY6NOrz2GGLIMXGTNHA3xyNPCuBrcJnj-2F2kmrKzuibmy-2F2XA6fyJ4L8vb2XFa6THxFHO-2BvVGw-2BbpMqKWwx-2FzA4CX8wTHB5nkjMSkYPRX8nFXEjf3oHNahsyol01Ectoiwj2FBEGdK8oWZ6uN8b1UlSRM85B8u2z3tDQD-2B7ys2RHqyLyWXoD0ibRH-2FI80Lfd1gpGlvIU9/J7Pa) _**Doyle's New Deal**_ A new study by Oregon State University found that protecting our region's forests from commercial logging will be essential to mitigating the worst impacts of the climate crisis. Currently, the timber industry makes up a majority of our state's annual carbon emissions. This is why I'm excited to vote for Doyle Canning to represent Oregon's Fourth District in Congress. Canning is fighting for a Green New Deal that will protect our forests and our climate, and unlike her opponent, she is not accepting donations from the fossil fuel industry and big timber -- the industry that is the leading cause of climate change in our region. It is time to take a stand for our forests, for our climate, and our future. Vote for Canning in the May 19 primary. Dylan Plummer, Eugene
---
[**DAILY EMERALD**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2ym/8SiFsV57Szu5myI6YBgxEA/h4/8HtxoXUPdrEQnOlv5SQseLpwTDZ5hMUwiz8XFDRhAoHF4JUJqj8XfL3m-2B2JapyExgEYNSj9LjwtmVeJLnPO-2FldwUkObUUdRylHNvRKLtG65PyIxt6JjfJcpVIPNJ7B0g4ocngWAOQiYfyoAQemuWBWnHzvhJ63KqInyigtcumKoJkyo2VCNKRg-2FoRtT9lO4vp0ex3mtMhseW-2Fp35FZtMcUmggXkNFOqoasDn5J3BSjsXGjoc-2BzZuONi-2BxtkpElhiAWwyCIV-2FTK-2FGIxoKB9AcOd8TPRZHgNRlX99RGgj8uHZKMfp-2FJ97LyHPw8itcx8WEOXCL-2FDTv5r4C2QRblCYe-2FWVEPV9uMCqlMgSI-2BpaYfpyZi7vubHM1cTMStePIuCmqi44F7mz8kmrBx2CzZMRNYvzLsiyymBSqeJ6lFNlGN-2FSoYGmm3PFmtBnOeZzvxNRjrvW62DZZifOebaoao26RQ9XB-2FMzfS0DKlNct-2FZrdjKM-3D/mQHJ) _**Jordan Cove Pipeline Project: Where it's At, Where it's Going....**_ "On Jan. 7, Coos Bay city councilors voted 4-3 in favor of increased dredging in the channel serving Jordan Cove -- dredging makes the channel bigger for the large transport ships that pick up the liquified natural gas. "You saw four city counselors tonight who sold out their community and sided with a foreign multinational fossil fuel company instead of listening to their constituents and the community who are dead set against this project," Congressional Candidate Doyle Canning said over the phone directly following the vote."
---
[**KEZI**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.2ym/8SiFsV57Szu5myI6YBgxEA/h5/Y-2FgbIxpjl7vCXwYlxcWe74cJIRNk1BsdXc03JixbMX3KgWMCbbSCydC3bZxBc1tJx4r5FFv8Wllz735lRuDeCjBpuyL-2BaTHhJiAMS3ITROcM-2BcoK2Iz4uiDhTzzjwC-2FoAm3KynqQtwgPPdZiONx2SbXLaDLadn-2Fnh7ADpNvNh-2B2Ciurr0TrTDZ4gZf2JTDfFffEjU3xlo3aQ5isSmPLF8EokCyu-2B-2F2-2FPAlwV0NaOcjLyFc2OGI4eciWmCHbb8h2q3Rl7LVl21onO9q4GDesXAvvryi0VVMYtEky0suruWgfOqxTVn-2FvaV-2FuXovkRbvSgnCh59p3Ar7PL4AiFCuPhN7hFr72EtUHnfNybzmuRo8-2BLOraBuxP5ibbg06aFMKt0/jSva) _**Canning Taking on Defazio with Grassroots Campaign**_ Volunteers are manning phone banks and canvassing on the streets. They said Canning's grassroots methods are what reeled them into the campaign. "When there is a rally taking place, Doyle will be there and she will show me and the community that she really cares about the situation or the issue, either immigration issues, kids being locked up in cages or the climate crisis," said supporter Silver Mogart.

**ANNOUNCEMENTS**

READY TO FILE. READY TO WIN. Thanks to our volunteers for hitting the streets across the district last weekend and absolutely CRUSHING IT. Together we gathered over 600 signatures to get Doyle Canning on the May primary ballot. Adding these to our existing stack of petitions means we are more than ready to file. Stay tuned to social media for that exciting moment when we officially will file. And THANK YOU to all of our dedicated street teams who worked street corners in Roseburg, dog parks and playgrounds in Eugene, the OSU v. Stanford women's basketball game in Corvallis, and more!

clean_body: | | | | "'I'm not a political insider, that's for sure.' ...Canning supports policies like the Green New Deal, universal healthcare and wants action on climate change." Watch and share of our grassroots campaign. | Dear supporters, This week has seen a surge in support for our campaign. With back to back local news coverage, another national endorsement, and our weekend of action with signature-gathering street teams of volunteers in Eugene, Roseburg, and Corvallis. Over 600 voters in our district signed on this weekend on to Doyle Canning for Congress on the ballot for the May primary election. Let that put to rest any rumors that our campaign doesn't have the support to mount this challenge to a 33-year incumbent. As a wise person once said, "People who say it is impossible should not interrupt the people doing it." The conversations we had with real voters on the street were the same ones we've been having at the doors and on the phones: people are hungry for change, excited about the campaign, and ready to vote Canning for Congress. Thank you for all you're doing to make her-story in 2020. I hope to see you Saturday night at my 40th birthday party fundraiser at the new Cornbread cafe in Springfield! Onward, Doyle | Please Join Lauren Regan, Jamil Jonna, Melissa Carino this Saturday for a January Birthday Celebration Fundraiser! At Cornbread Cafe's new Springfield location Featuring Live Music by Eugene's own Tastebuds Open Bar and full menu available. Discounts on Food and Drink at the Register for button-wearing supporters. Free vegan birthday cake, while it lasts! This is a fundraiser. There is no cover charge, but we will be asking every guest to donate as generously as you can to our campaign. | | ENDORSEMENT ALERT | Brand New Congress, the movement that recruited Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to run in 2018, has endorsed Canning for Congress: "Doyle is running in 2020 to continue the fight for healthcare care for all, workers' rights, education reform, criminal justice reform, clean air and clean water and to take on corruption in Washington. Remember, every vote in Congress affects us all." | IN THE NEWS... Doyle's New Deal A new study by Oregon State University found that protecting our region's forests from commercial logging will be essential to mitigating the worst impacts of the climate crisis. Currently, the timber industry makes up a majority of our state's annual carbon emissions. This is why I'm excited to vote for Doyle Canning to represent Oregon's Fourth District in Congress. Canning is fighting for a Green New Deal that will protect our forests and our climate, and unlike her opponent, she is not accepting donations from the fossil fuel industry and big timber -- the industry that is the leading cause of climate change in our region. It is time to take a stand for our forests, for our climate, and our future. Vote for Canning in the May 19 primary. Dylan Plummer, Eugene Jordan Cove Pipeline Project: Where it's At, Where it's Going.... "On Jan. 7, Coos Bay city councilors voted 4-3 in favor of increased dredging in the channel serving Jordan Cove -- dredging makes the channel bigger for the large transport ships that pick up the liquified natural gas. "You saw four city counselors tonight who sold out their community and sided with a foreign multinational fossil fuel company instead of listening to their constituents and the community who are dead set against this project," Congressional Candidate Doyle Canning said over the phone directly following the vote." Canning Taking on Defazio with Grassroots Campaign Volunteers are manning phone banks and canvassing on the streets. They said Canning's grassroots methods are what reeled them into the campaign. "When there is a rally taking place, Doyle will be there and she will show me and the community that she really cares about the situation or the issue, either immigration issues, kids being locked up in cages or the climate crisis," said supporter Silver Mogart. | | | | | | | ANNOUNCEMENTS | READY TO FILE. READY TO WIN. Thanks to our volunteers for hitting the streets across the district last weekend and absolutely CRUSHING IT. Together we gathered over 600 signatures to get Doyle Canning on the May primary ballot. Adding these to our existing stack of petitions means we are more than ready to file. Stay tuned to social media for that exciting moment when we officially will file. And THANK YOU to all of our dedicated street teams who worked street corners in Roseburg, dog parks and playgrounds in Eugene, the OSU v. Stanford women's basketball game in Corvallis, and more! | ORAN MOR ARTISAN MEAD: SAT. FEB. 1 Join us in Roseburg for a fundraiser at the Meadery! Featuring locally made honey wine and music by the Clean Energy String Band. 2-5 PM. | FELLOWSHIPS! JOIN THE TEAM Your movement, your campaign, join our fellowship program today! Our Fellowship program serves two purposes: to elect new leadership in Oregon 04, and to train new leaders in electoral politics. Fellows join a scrappy network of passionate grassroots leaders. The program is open to all ages! | UPCOMING EVENTS Join volunteers to call voters to tell them about what's at stake in this election! This event runs 4-8 pm and repeats weekly on Wednesdays at 1492 West 6th in Eugene. JOSEPHINE COUNTY DEMOCRATS HAPPY HOUR Join us as we meet and mingle at the edge of CD 4 in Grant's Pass Oregon. 6-9 PM at Double Taps in the Grant's Pass shopping center. ?linkid=16&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-no-regrets-in-the-roaring-20s&emailreferrer=email706467from939490&emailsubject=the-oregonizer-not-a-political-insider-thats-for-sure Join supporters to reach out to voters to tell them about our campaign. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: New polls show Trump may be more unpopular than was previously known
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, According to Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight, pollsters may be overstating Trump's popularity at 42% job approval because they aren't factoring increased polarization into their questions. Yet they also found that despite Trump's low nationwide popularity, Republican voters are unmoved and rank him second only to Reagan in terms of favorability. With the Senate trial in its second day and given these conflicting results, we need to hear directly from you today: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9e/6e9863e8/81e4f56/1db05577/2156061496/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/L9uTPh1k") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9e/6e9863e8/81e4f56/1db05577/2156061496/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/L9uTPh1k") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf9e/6e9863e8/81e4f56/1db05577/2156061496/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/L9uTPh1k")

Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election.

I knew running for president would be no different - _but restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight._

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass.

[We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about our kids' future than their next tweet.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab5e/134673f2/8449e31/69974521/785742974/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twoweeksad?refcode=EM_FR_B2_012220_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ads so they hear our message about the future we can build together.

[So can you chip in $5 to my campaign for president? clean_body: | | | I'm so grateful for you, Team. Even when the DNC blocked us from the debates, or when some of the pundits doubted us, or when we announced our most aggressive fundraising goal yet, this team pulled through. We launched our newest TV ad in New Hampshire today. My team says we need at least 10 people from 18326 to donate today to stay on track and keep it airing on TV. "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election. I knew running for president would be no different - but restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight. We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. "" That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress. But I can't do it alone. I need your help to keep fighting and make sure everyone sees our TV ads so they hear our message about the future we can build together.
